Training Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the resident received transfer training for at least 15 minutes a day in the last seven days. 0 Minimum
7 Maximum

544 O0500F_WLKG_TRNG_NUM O0500F_WLKG_TRNG_NUM O0500F Restorative Nursing: Walking Training Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the resident received walking training for at least 15 minutes a day in the last seven days. 0 Minimum
